request: Plan the rollout of a customer-facing ops status module so support and staff can inspect planning packets without affecting execution flows.

docket.objective: Deliver a reviewable rollout plan for a customer-facing ops status surface.
docket.whyNow: Support needs visibility into planning outputs before the next round of operator tooling lands.
knownFacts: Studio Brain already exposes read-only status endpoints
unknowns: How much customer-facing language needs support review

assumptions.statement: A read-only surface can ship before final execution handoff tooling exists.
